src/dailySummary.ts:import { Inscripcio, CategoriaParella, MetodePagament } from './types';
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:export interface DailySummaryRow {
src/dailySummary.ts:  dateStr: string;                  // Format: YYYY-MM-DD
src/dailySummary.ts:  totalRegistrations: number;       // Number of registrations
src/dailySummary.ts:  waitingListCount: number;         // Count in waiting list
src/dailySummary.ts:  totalRevenue: number;             // Sum of preuCalculat
src/dailySummary.ts:  cashRevenue: number;              // Paid via 'efectiu' / cash
src/dailySummary.ts:  bizumRevenue: number;             // Paid via 'bizum'
src/dailySummary.ts:  adultsCount: number;              // Inscriptions of category/type adults
src/dailySummary.ts:  juvenilsCount: number;            // Inscriptions of category/type juvenils
src/dailySummary.ts:  minorsCount: number;              // Total number of minors among the participants
src/dailySummary.ts:  domasCount: number;               // Sum of teDomasBalco ? 1 : 0
src/dailySummary.ts:  extraMocadorsCount: number;       // Sum of teMocadorsExtra
src/dailySummary.ts:}
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:/**
src/dailySummary.ts: * Parses and groups inscriptions into standard daily summaries.
src/dailySummary.ts: */
src/dailySummary.ts:export function calculateDailySummaries(inscripcions: Inscripcio[]): DailySummaryRow[] {
src/dailySummary.ts:  const map: Record<string, DailySummaryRow> = {};
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:  for (const item of inscripcions) {
src/dailySummary.ts:    // Determine the creation date in local/regular format: YYYY-MM-DD
src/dailySummary.ts:    let dateStr = 'Sense Data';
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.creadoEn) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      try {
src/dailySummary.ts:        const d = new Date(item.creadoEn);
src/dailySummary.ts:        if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) {
src/dailySummary.ts:          const year = d.getFullYear();
src/dailySummary.ts:          const month = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
src/dailySummary.ts:          const day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
src/dailySummary.ts:          dateStr = `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
src/dailySummary.ts:        }
src/dailySummary.ts:      } catch (e) {
src/dailySummary.ts:        // Fallback
src/dailySummary.ts:      }
src/dailySummary.ts:    }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (!map[dateStr]) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      map[dateStr] = {
src/dailySummary.ts:        dateStr,
src/dailySummary.ts:        totalRegistrations: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        waitingListCount: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        totalRevenue: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        cashRevenue: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        bizumRevenue: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        adultsCount: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        juvenilsCount: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        minorsCount: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        domasCount: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:        extraMocadorsCount: 0,
src/dailySummary.ts:      };
src/dailySummary.ts:    }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    const day = map[dateStr];
src/dailySummary.ts:    day.totalRegistrations += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.llistaEspera) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      day.waitingListCount += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    const price = Number(item.preuCalculat) || 0;
src/dailySummary.ts:    day.totalRevenue += price;
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.metodePagament === MetodePagament.EFECTIU) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      day.cashRevenue += price;
src/dailySummary.ts:    } else if (item.metodePagament === MetodePagament.BIZUM) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      day.bizumRevenue += price;
src/dailySummary.ts:    }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.categoria === CategoriaParella.ADULT) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      day.adultsCount += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    } else if (item.categoria === CategoriaParella.JUVENIL) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      day.juvenilsCount += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    // Count minors
src/dailySummary.ts:    let minors = 0;
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.c1EsMenor) minors += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.c2EsMenor) minors += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    day.minorsCount += minors;
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (item.teDomasBalco) {
src/dailySummary.ts:      day.domasCount += 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:    day.extraMocadorsCount += Number(item.teMocadorsExtra) || 0;
src/dailySummary.ts:  }
src/dailySummary.ts:
src/dailySummary.ts:  // Convert to array and sort chronologically (most recent first, or oldest first? Oldest to newest makes sense for ledger sheets)
src/dailySummary.ts:  return Object.values(map).sort((a, b) => {
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (a.dateStr === 'Sense Data') return 1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    if (b.dateStr === 'Sense Data') return -1;
src/dailySummary.ts:    return a.dateStr.localeCompare(b.dateStr);
src/dailySummary.ts:  });
src/dailySummary.ts:}

src/components/Confirmation.tsx:          }

src/components/Confirmation.tsx:        }

src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      if (c.length === 3) {

src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      const r = parseInt(c.substring(0, 2), 16);
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      const g = parseInt(c.substring(2, 4), 16);
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      const b = parseInt(c.substring(4, 6), 16);
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      if (isNaN(r) || isNaN(g) || isNaN(b)) {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:        return `rgba(255, 0, 144, ${alpha})`;
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      }
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      return `rgba(255, 0, 144, ${alpha})`;
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    }

src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:  const getYoutubeEmbedUrl = (url: string, asBackground = false) => {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    if (!url) return '';
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    let videoId = '';
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    // Parse normal watch URL
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    if (url.includes('youtube.com/watch')) {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      const match = url.match(/[?&]v=([^&#]+)/);
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      if (match) videoId = match[1];
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    } 
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    // Parse short share URL (youtu.be)
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    else if (url.includes('youtu.be/')) {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      const parts = url.split('youtu.be/');
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      if (parts[1]) videoId = parts[1].split(/[?&#]/)[0];
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    }
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    // Parse embed URL already
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    else if (url.includes('youtube.com/embed/')) {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      const parts = url.split('youtube.com/embed/');
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      if (parts[1]) videoId = parts[1].split(/[?&#]/)[0];
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    }
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    if (!videoId) return url; // Fallback to raw
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    if (asBackground) {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      return `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${videoId}?autoplay=1&mute=1&loop=1&controls=0&playlist=${videoId}&showinfo=0&rel=0&iv_load_policy=3&playsinline=1&enablejsapi=1`;
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    } else {
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:      return `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${videoId}?autoplay=0&rel=0`;
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:    }
src/components/PortadaPage.tsx:  };

src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      const ctx = new AudioContext();
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      const gain = ctx.createGain();
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      osc.type = 'sine';
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime);
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, ctx.currentTime);
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + dur);
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      osc.connect(gain);
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      gain.connect(ctx.destination);
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      osc.start();
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:      osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + dur);
src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:    } catch (e) {

src/components/AdminScanner.tsx:    }

src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:// React custom hook to translate a raw text string reactively
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:export function useTranslatedText(text: string): string {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:  const { language } = useLanguage();
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:  const [translated, setTranslated] = useState(text);
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    if (!text || !text.trim()) {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:      setTranslated('');
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:      return;
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    }
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    let isMounted = true;
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    async function doTranslation() {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:      try {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:        const res = await translateText(text, 'auto', language);
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:        if (isMounted) {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:          setTranslated(res);
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:        }
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:        if (isMounted) setTranslated(text);
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:      }
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    }
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    doTranslation();
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:      isMounted = false;
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:    };
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:  }, [text, language]);
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:  return translated;
src/components/TranslatedText.tsx:}

src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:function getYoutubeEmbedUrl(url: string = '') {
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:  if (!url) return '';
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:  const regExp = /^.*(youtu.be\/|v\/|u\/\w\/|embed\/|watch\?v=|\&v=)([^#\&\?]*).*/;
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:  const match = url.match(regExp);
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:  if (match && match[2].length === 11) {
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:    return `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${match[2]}`;
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:  }
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:  return '';
src/components/NotificationFeed.tsx:}

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Portada Configuration State
src/App.tsx:  const [portadaConfig, setPortadaConfig] = useState<PortadaConfig>(() => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem('tast_portada_config_2026');
src/App.tsx:      if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:        return { ...PORTADA_CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...JSON.parse(saved) };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e) {}
src/App.tsx:    return PORTADA_CONFIG_DEFAULTS;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Navigation Routing States
src/App.tsx:  // 'portada' | 'public' | 'confirmacio' | 'login' | 'admin-dashboard' | 'admin-ficha' | 'admin-config' | 'admin-scanner' | 'mobile-scanner'
src/App.tsx:  const [view, setView] = useState<string>(() => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem('tast_portada_config_2026');
src/App.tsx:      if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
src/App.tsx:        if (parsed.activa === false) {
src/App.tsx:          return 'public';
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e) {}
src/App.tsx:    return 'portada';
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  const [mobileScannerSyncKey, setMobileScannerSyncKey] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Load from Supabase on component mount
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    async function loadConfigFromSupabase() {
src/App.tsx:      if (!isSupabaseConfigured) return;
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const dbConfig = await getSupabaseSetting<PortadaConfig | null>('tast_portada_config_2026', null);
src/App.tsx:        if (dbConfig) {
src/App.tsx:          const merged = { ...PORTADA_CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...dbConfig };
src/App.tsx:          setPortadaConfig(merged);
src/App.tsx:          // Auto route to public if the loaded Supabase landing page is set to inactive
src/App.tsx:          if (merged.activa === false && view === 'portada') {
src/App.tsx:            setView('public');
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:        console.error("Failed to load Supabase settings:", err);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    loadConfigFromSupabase();
src/App.tsx:  }, [view]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Sync Portada state dynamically with localStorage & Supabase changes
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const handlePortadaChange = async () => {
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        if (isSupabaseConfigured) {
src/App.tsx:          const dbConfig = await getSupabaseSetting<PortadaConfig | null>('tast_portada_config_2026', null);
src/App.tsx:          if (dbConfig) {
src/App.tsx:            setPortadaConfig({ ...PORTADA_CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...dbConfig });
src/App.tsx:            return;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        const saved = localStorage.getItem('tast_portada_config_2026');
src/App.tsx:        if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:          setPortadaConfig({ ...PORTADA_CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...JSON.parse(saved) });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:        console.error(e);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('portadaConfigChanged', handlePortadaChange);
src/App.tsx:    return () => {
src/App.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('portadaConfigChanged', handlePortadaChange);
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Persistence States
src/App.tsx:  const [config, setConfig] = useState<SistemaConfig>(CONFIG_INICIAL);

src/App.tsx:          }

src/App.tsx:                inscripcions={inscripcions}
src/App.tsx:                onBack={() => {

src/App.tsx:                  window.history.pushState({}, '', window.location.pathname);
src/App.tsx:                  setView(portadaConfig.activa ? 'portada' : 'public');
src/App.tsx:                }}
src/App.tsx:              />
src/App.tsx:            )}
src/App.tsx:          </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:        </AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:      </main>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      {/* Footer information bar */}
src/App.tsx:      <footer className="bg-zinc-950 py-6 px-8 text-center text-white border-t border-zinc-900 mt-12">
src/App.tsx:        <p className="font-sans font-black text-xs tracking-tight text-white flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
src/App.tsx:        </p>
src/App.tsx:        <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 font-mono mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider">
src/App.tsx:            ? 'disseny del quadre de comandament i formulari integral 2026' 
src/App.tsx:            : 'diseño del cuadro de mando y formulario integral 2026'}
src/App.tsx:        </p>
src/App.tsx:      </footer>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:}

src/LanguageContext.tsx:const LanguageContext = createContext<LanguageContextType | undefined>(undefined);
src/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/LanguageContext.tsx:export function LanguageProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  const [language, setLanguageState] = useState<Language>(() => {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    try {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem('tast_idioma_2026');
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      if (saved === 'es' || saved === 'ca') {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:        return saved;
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      }
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      console.error(e);
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    }
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    return 'ca';
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  });
src/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  const setLanguage = (lang: Language) => {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    setLanguageState(lang);
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    try {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      localStorage.setItem('tast_idioma_2026', lang);
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      console.error(e);
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    }
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  };
src/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  const t = (key: string, replacements?: Record<string, string | number>): string => {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    let text = translations[language]?.[key] || translations['ca']?.[key] || key;
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    if (replacements) {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      Object.entries(replacements).forEach(([k, val]) => {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:        text = text.replace(`{${k}}`, String(val));
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      });
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    }
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    return text;
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  };
src/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  return (
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    <LanguageContext.Provider value={{ language, setLanguage, t }}>
src/LanguageContext.tsx:      {children}
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    </LanguageContext.Provider>
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  );
src/LanguageContext.tsx:}
src/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/LanguageContext.tsx:export function useLanguage() {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  const context = useContext(LanguageContext);
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  if (context === undefined) {
src/LanguageContext.tsx:    throw new Error('useLanguage must be used within a LanguageProvider');
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  }
src/LanguageContext.tsx:  return context;
src/LanguageContext.tsx:}

src/googleSync.ts:import { Inscripcio } from './types';
src/googleSync.ts:import { calculateDailySummaries } from './dailySummary';
src/googleSync.ts:
src/googleSync.ts:/**
src/googleSync.ts: * Pushes the full, current list of inscriptions to the user's Google Sheet
src/googleSync.ts: * in real-time via the configured Google Apps Script Web App URL.
src/googleSync.ts: * Now supports dual-tab synchronization: raw registrations and daily summary (cierre de día).
src/googleSync.ts: */
src/googleSync.ts:export async function syncToGoogleSheet(
src/googleSync.ts:  inscripcions: Inscripcio[],
src/googleSync.ts:  googleSheetSyncUrl?: string,
src/googleSync.ts:  googleSheetSyncActive?: boolean
src/googleSync.ts:): Promise<boolean> {
src/googleSync.ts:  if (!googleSheetSyncActive || !googleSheetSyncUrl) {
src/googleSync.ts:    return false;
src/googleSync.ts:  }
src/googleSync.ts:
src/googleSync.ts:  try {
src/googleSync.ts:    const formattedData = inscripcions.map((i) => ({
src/googleSync.ts:      codiSeguiment: i.codiSeguiment,
src/googleSync.ts:      categoria: i.categoria,
src/googleSync.ts:      c1Nom: i.c1Nom,
src/googleSync.ts:      c1Cognoms: i.c1Cognoms,
src/googleSync.ts:      c1Email: i.c1Email,
src/googleSync.ts:      c1Telefon: i.c1Telefon,
src/googleSync.ts:      c1Talla: i.c1Talla,
src/googleSync.ts:      c1UniformeTipus: i.c1UniformeTipus || 'compra',
src/googleSync.ts:      c1EsMenor: i.c1EsMenor ? 'SÍ' : 'NO',
src/googleSync.ts:      c1TutorNom: i.c1EsMenor ? (i.c1TutorNom || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c1TutorCognoms: i.c1EsMenor ? (i.c1TutorCognoms || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c1TutorDni: i.c1EsMenor ? (i.c1TutorDni || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c1TutorTelefon: i.c1EsMenor ? (i.c1TutorTelefon || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c2Nom: i.c2Nom,
src/googleSync.ts:      c2Cognoms: i.c2Cognoms,
src/googleSync.ts:      c2Email: i.c2Email,
src/googleSync.ts:      c2Telefon: i.c2Telefon,
src/googleSync.ts:      c2Talla: i.c2Talla,
src/googleSync.ts:      c2UniformeTipus: i.c2UniformeTipus || 'compra',
src/googleSync.ts:      c2EsMenor: i.c2EsMenor ? 'SÍ' : 'NO',
src/googleSync.ts:      c2TutorNom: i.c2EsMenor ? (i.c2TutorNom || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c2TutorCognoms: i.c2EsMenor ? (i.c2TutorCognoms || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c2TutorDni: i.c2EsMenor ? (i.c2TutorDni || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      c2TutorTelefon: i.c2EsMenor ? (i.c2TutorTelefon || '') : '',
src/googleSync.ts:      preuTotal: i.preuCalculat,
src/googleSync.ts:      domasBalco: i.teDomasBalco ? 'SÍ' : 'NO',
src/googleSync.ts:      mocadorsExtra: i.teMocadorsExtra,
src/googleSync.ts:      estatPagament: i.estatPagament,
src/googleSync.ts:      metodePagament: i.metodePagament || 'CAP',
src/googleSync.ts:      validacioDni: i.estatDni,
src/googleSync.ts:      entregaMaterial: i.entregaMaterial,
src/googleSync.ts:      llistaEspera: i.llistaEspera ? 'SÍ' : 'NO',
src/googleSync.ts:      dataCreacio: i.creadoEn ? new Date(i.creadoEn).toLocaleString('ca-ES') : ''
src/googleSync.ts:    }));
src/googleSync.ts:
src/googleSync.ts:    // Calculate aggregated day-by-day summaries
src/googleSync.ts:    const summaries = calculateDailySummaries(inscripcions);
src/googleSync.ts:
src/googleSync.ts:    // Trigger POST request with standard text/plain to bypass complex CORS preflights in Google Apps Script redirects
src/googleSync.ts:    const response = await fetch(googleSheetSyncUrl, {
src/googleSync.ts:      method: 'POST',
src/googleSync.ts:      mode: 'no-cors', // standard way to submit data cross-origin to script.google.com without preflight failure
src/googleSync.ts:      headers: {
src/googleSync.ts:        'Content-Type': 'text/plain',
src/googleSync.ts:      },
src/googleSync.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({
src/googleSync.ts:        action: 'sync_dual',
src/googleSync.ts:        data: formattedData,
src/googleSync.ts:        summaries: summaries,
src/googleSync.ts:      }),
src/googleSync.ts:    });
src/googleSync.ts:
src/googleSync.ts:    console.log("Real-time Google Sheet dual-tab synchronization packet dispatched successfully.");
src/googleSync.ts:    return true;
src/googleSync.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/googleSync.ts:    console.warn("Could not dispatch real-time Google Sheet sync:", error);
src/googleSync.ts:    return false;

src/translateService.ts:// Persistent translation cache to prevent code 429 quota exhaustion on Gemini API

src/translateService.ts:
src/translateService.ts:let translationCache: Record<string, string> = {};

src/translateService.ts:export async function translateText(
src/translateService.ts:  text: string, 
src/translateService.ts:  source: 'ca' | 'es' | 'auto', 
src/translateService.ts:  target: 'ca' | 'es'
src/translateService.ts:): Promise<string> {
src/translateService.ts:  if (!text || !text.trim()) return text;
src/translateService.ts:  if (source !== 'auto' && source === target) return text;
src/translateService.ts:  
src/translateService.ts:  // If we already detected quota exceeded in this session, return text directly
src/translateService.ts:  if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sessionStorage?.getItem('tast_translation_quota_exceeded') === 'true') {
src/translateService.ts:    return text;
src/translateService.ts:  }
src/translateService.ts:
src/translateService.ts:  // If the text is standard numbers, punctuation, or very short, bypass translation
src/translateService.ts:  const clean = text.trim();
src/translateService.ts:  if (/^[0-9\s\-\+\.\,€\/]+$/.test(clean)) {
src/translateService.ts:    return clean;
src/translateService.ts:  }
src/translateService.ts:
src/translateService.ts:  const cacheKey = `${clean}_${source}_${target}`;
src/translateService.ts:  if (translationCache[cacheKey]) {
src/translateService.ts:    return translationCache[cacheKey];
src/translateService.ts:  }
src/translateService.ts:  
src/translateService.ts:  try {
src/translateService.ts:    const response = await fetch('/api/translate', {
src/translateService.ts:      method: 'POST',
src/translateService.ts:      headers: {
src/translateService.ts:        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
src/translateService.ts:      },
src/translateService.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({
src/translateService.ts:        text: clean,
src/translateService.ts:        source,
src/translateService.ts:        target,
src/translateService.ts:      }),
src/translateService.ts:    });
src/translateService.ts:    
src/translateService.ts:    if (response.status === 429 || response.status === 503) {
src/translateService.ts:      if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sessionStorage) {
src/translateService.ts:        window.sessionStorage.setItem('tast_translation_quota_exceeded', 'true');
src/translateService.ts:        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('translationQuotaExceeded'));
src/translateService.ts:      }
src/translateService.ts:      return text;
src/translateService.ts:    }
src/translateService.ts:
src/translateService.ts:    if (response.ok) {
src/translateService.ts:      const data = await response.json();
src/translateService.ts:      const result = data.translatedText || clean;
src/translateService.ts:      
src/translateService.ts:      // Save to in-memory and persistent storage
src/translateService.ts:      translationCache[cacheKey] = result;
src/translateService.ts:      saveCache();
src/translateService.ts:      return result;
src/translateService.ts:    } else {
src/translateService.ts:      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
src/translateService.ts:      if (data.error === "quota_exceeded") {
src/translateService.ts:        if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sessionStorage) {
src/translateService.ts:          window.sessionStorage.setItem('tast_translation_quota_exceeded', 'true');
src/translateService.ts:          window.dispatchEvent(new Event('translationQuotaExceeded'));
src/translateService.ts:        }
src/translateService.ts:      }
src/translateService.ts:    }
src/translateService.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/translateService.ts:    console.warn("Translation service call failed gracefully:", error);
src/translateService.ts:  }
src/translateService.ts:  
src/translateService.ts:  // Fallback to original text on any failure
src/translateService.ts:  return text;
src/translateService.ts:}

src/supabaseClient.ts:/**
src/supabaseClient.ts: * Generic getter function for any setting in Supabase.
src/supabaseClient.ts: * Supports adaptive schema formats where columns are named 'id' or 'key' 
src/supabaseClient.ts: * and payloads are named 'value', 'config' or 'settings'.
src/supabaseClient.ts: */
src/supabaseClient.ts:export async function getSupabaseSetting<T>(key: string, defaultValue: T): Promise<T> {
src/supabaseClient.ts:  if (!supabase) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return defaultValue;
src/supabaseClient.ts:  }
src/supabaseClient.ts:  
src/supabaseClient.ts:  try {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    const { data, error } = await supabase
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .from('settings')
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .select('*');
src/supabaseClient.ts:      
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (error) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:      console.warn(`Warning reading settings table from Supabase for key [${key}]:`, error.message || error);
src/supabaseClient.ts:      return defaultValue;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    }
src/supabaseClient.ts:    
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (data && data.length > 0) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:      const row = data.find(r => r.key === key || r.id === key);
src/supabaseClient.ts:      if (row) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:        let configPayload = row.value !== undefined ? row.value 
src/supabaseClient.ts:                        : row.config !== undefined ? row.config 
src/supabaseClient.ts:                        : row.settings !== undefined ? row.settings 
src/supabaseClient.ts:                        : row;
src/supabaseClient.ts:        
src/supabaseClient.ts:        if (typeof configPayload === 'string') {
src/supabaseClient.ts:          try {
src/supabaseClient.ts:            configPayload = JSON.parse(configPayload);
src/supabaseClient.ts:          } catch(e) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:            // Not double-serialized
src/supabaseClient.ts:          }
src/supabaseClient.ts:        }
src/supabaseClient.ts:        return configPayload !== undefined ? (configPayload as T) : defaultValue;
src/supabaseClient.ts:      }
src/supabaseClient.ts:    }
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return defaultValue;
src/supabaseClient.ts:  } catch (err) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    console.warn(`Exception fetching settings from Supabase/Settings for key [${key}]:`, err);
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return defaultValue;
src/supabaseClient.ts:  }
src/supabaseClient.ts:}

src/supabaseClient.ts:/**
src/supabaseClient.ts: * Generic setter function for any setting in Supabase.
src/supabaseClient.ts: * Adaptive Column Mapping is done automatically.
src/supabaseClient.ts: */
src/supabaseClient.ts:export async function saveSupabaseSetting(key: string, value: any): Promise<boolean> {
src/supabaseClient.ts:  if (!supabase) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return false;
src/supabaseClient.ts:  }
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:  try {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    // Remedy 3: Formatter guard - serialize object/array, keep string plain
src/supabaseClient.ts:    const normalizedValue = typeof value === 'object' && value !== null
src/supabaseClient.ts:      ? JSON.stringify(value)
src/supabaseClient.ts:      : value;
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:    // Main Operation: Direct upsert by key with conflict resolution on key
src/supabaseClient.ts:    const { error: upsertError } = await supabase
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .from('settings')
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .upsert({ key: key, value: normalizedValue }, { onConflict: 'key' });
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (!upsertError) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:      return true;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    }
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:    console.warn(`Direct upsert on Conflict 'key' failed, executing defensive select/update/insert rollback flow:`, upsertError.message);
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:    // Defensive fallback: Check existence and perform separate UPDATE/INSERT query
src/supabaseClient.ts:    const { data: existingRow, error: selectError } = await supabase
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .from('settings')
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .select('id')
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .eq('key', key)
src/supabaseClient.ts:      .maybeSingle();
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (!selectError && existingRow) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:      // Record exists, do a targeted UPDATE
src/supabaseClient.ts:      const { error: updateError } = await supabase
src/supabaseClient.ts:        .from('settings')
src/supabaseClient.ts:        .update({ value: normalizedValue })
src/supabaseClient.ts:        .eq('key', key);
src/supabaseClient.ts:      return !updateError;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    } else {
src/supabaseClient.ts:      // Record does not exist, do a targeted INSERT
src/supabaseClient.ts:      const { error: insertError } = await supabase
src/supabaseClient.ts:        .from('settings')
src/supabaseClient.ts:        .insert({ key: key, value: normalizedValue });
src/supabaseClient.ts:      return !insertError;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    }
src/supabaseClient.ts:  } catch (err) {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    console.error(`Exception saving setting to Supabase for key [${key}]:`, err);
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return false;
src/supabaseClient.ts:  }
src/supabaseClient.ts:}

src/supabaseClient.ts:  try {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return JSON.parse(val);
src/supabaseClient.ts:  } catch(e) {}
src/supabaseClient.ts:  return {};
src/supabaseClient.ts:}
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:function parseInscripcionesRows(rows: any[]): Inscripcio[] {
src/supabaseClient.ts:  return rows.map(r => {
src/supabaseClient.ts:    // Fallback if the whole object was saved inside a single JSON field
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (r.value && typeof r.value === 'object') return r.value;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (r.data && typeof r.data === 'object') return r.data;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (r.payload && typeof r.payload === 'object') return r.payload;
src/supabaseClient.ts:    if (r.config && typeof r.config === 'object') return r.config;
src/supabaseClient.ts:
src/supabaseClient.ts:    // Standard column parse with snake_case and casing fallback modes
src/supabaseClient.ts:    return {
src/supabaseClient.ts:      id: r.id || r.key || '',
src/supabaseClient.ts:      codiSeguiment: r.codiSeguiment !== undefined ? r.codiSeguiment 
src/supabaseClient.ts:                    : (r.codi_seguiment || r.codiseguiment || ''),

api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:export default async function handler(req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse) {
api/translate.ts:  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
api/translate.ts:    return res.status(405).json({ error: "Method not allowed" });
api/translate.ts:  }
api/translate.ts:  
api/translate.ts:  try {
api/translate.ts:    const { text, source, target } = req.body;
api/translate.ts:    if (!text || !source || !target) {
api/translate.ts:      return res.status(400).json({ error: "Falten paràmetres 'text', 'source' o 'target'" });
api/translate.ts:    }
api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:    if (!text.trim()) {
api/translate.ts:      return res.status(200).json({ translatedText: "" });
api/translate.ts:    }
api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:    const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || process.env.VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY;
api/translate.ts:    if (!apiKey) {
api/translate.ts:      console.warn("GEMINI_API_KEY no està definit, pre-retornem text original.");
api/translate.ts:      return res.status(200).json({ translatedText: text }); 
api/translate.ts:    }
api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:    const ai = new GoogleGenAI({
api/translate.ts:      apiKey,
api/translate.ts:      httpOptions: {
api/translate.ts:        headers: {
api/translate.ts:          'User-Agent': 'aistudio-build'
api/translate.ts:        }
api/translate.ts:      }
api/translate.ts:    });
api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:    const prompt = `Translate the following text from ${source} to ${target}.
api/translate.ts:Only return the raw translated text, without formatting, without quotes, without introductory text. 
api/translate.ts:Maintain the same capitalization and tone. If it contains placeholders like {{}} or HTML tags, leave them intact.
api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:Text:
api/translate.ts:${text}`;
api/translate.ts:
api/translate.ts:    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
api/translate.ts:      model: 'gemini-2.5-flash',
api/translate.ts:      contents: prompt,
api/translate.ts:      config: {
api/translate.ts:        temperature: 0.1,

server.ts:import express from "express";
server.ts:import path from "path";
server.ts:import nodemailer from "nodemailer";
server.ts:import fs from "fs";
server.ts:
server.ts:async function startServer() {
server.ts:  const app = express();
server.ts:  const PORT = 3000;
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Middleware to parse payload sizes
server.ts:  app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));
server.ts:  app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: '10mb' }));
server.ts:
server.ts:  // CORS and OPTIONS request preflight handling for routing compatibility
server.ts:  app.use((req, res, next) => {
server.ts:    res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
server.ts:    res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, PATCH, DELETE");
server.ts:    res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With");
server.ts:    if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
server.ts:      return res.sendStatus(200);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    next();
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // API Route to send a real SMTP email
server.ts:  app.post("/api/send-email", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { smtpConfig, emailData } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!smtpConfig || !emailData) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: "Falten paràmetres smtpConfig o emailData" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const { host, port, user, pass, senderName } = smtpConfig;
server.ts:      const { to, subject, html, attachments } = emailData;
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!host || !port || !user || !pass || !to || !subject || !html) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: "Falten camps obligatoris de la configuració SMTP o del correu" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const portNum = parseInt(port, 10);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Determine security (TLS/SSL) depending on standard ports
server.ts:      // Port 465 typically uses SSL/TLS direct connection from the start, so secure: true
server.ts:      // Port 587 uses STARTTLS upgrade from clear text, so secure: false
server.ts:      const secure = portNum === 465;
server.ts:
server.ts:      const transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({
server.ts:        host,
server.ts:        port: portNum,
server.ts:        secure,
server.ts:        auth: {
server.ts:          user,
server.ts:          pass,
server.ts:        },
server.ts:        tls: {
server.ts:          // Do not fail on invalid/self-signed SSL certificates (common with association servers)
server.ts:          rejectUnauthorized: false
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Base email options
server.ts:      const mailOptions: any = {
server.ts:        from: `"${senderName || 'Inscripcions El Tast'}" <${user}>`,
server.ts:        to,
server.ts:        subject,
server.ts:        html,
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Handle attachments if specified
server.ts:      if (attachments && Array.isArray(attachments)) {
server.ts:        mailOptions.attachments = attachments.map((att: any) => {
server.ts:          // Handle base64 image strings (e.g. inline QR codes or general attachments)
server.ts:          if (att.content && typeof att.content === 'string' && att.content.startsWith('data:')) {
server.ts:            const matches = att.content.match(/^data:(.+);base64,(.+)$/);
server.ts:            if (matches) {
server.ts:              const contentType = matches[1];
server.ts:              const base64Data = matches[2];
server.ts:              return {
server.ts:                filename: att.filename || "image.png",
server.ts:                content: Buffer.from(base64Data, 'base64'),
server.ts:                contentType,
server.ts:                cid: att.cid // If we want to reference it as <img src="cid:uq-qr-id" />
server.ts:              };
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          return att;
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const info = await transporter.sendMail(mailOptions);
server.ts:      console.log("Email sent successfully through SMTP server:", info.messageId);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      return res.json({ 
server.ts:        success: true, 
server.ts:        messageId: info.messageId,
server.ts:        response: info.response 
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error sending email via nodemailer:", error);
server.ts:      return res.status(500).json({ 
server.ts:        error: error.message || "Error al enviar el correo a través de SMTP." 
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Base API healthcheck endpoint
server.ts:  app.get("/api/health", (req, res) => {
server.ts:    res.json({ status: "ok", time: new Date() });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Lazy load GoogleGenAI client for translation
server.ts:  let aiClient: any = null;
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/translate", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { text, source, target } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!text || !source || !target) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: "Falten paràmetres 'text', 'source' o 'target'" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!text.trim()) {
server.ts:        return res.json({ translatedText: "" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY;
server.ts:      if (!apiKey) {
server.ts:        console.warn("GEMINI_API_KEY no està definit, pre-retornem text original.");
server.ts:        return res.json({ translatedText: text }); 
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!aiClient) {
server.ts:        const { GoogleGenAI } = await import("@google/genai");
server.ts:        aiClient = new GoogleGenAI({
server.ts:          apiKey,
server.ts:          httpOptions: {
server.ts:            headers: {
server.ts:              'User-Agent': 'aistudio-build',
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const targetName = target === 'ca' ? 'Catalan' : 'Spanish';
server.ts:
server.ts:      let prompt = '';
server.ts:      if (source === 'auto') {
server.ts:        prompt = `You are a professional Catalan-Spanish bilingual translator.
server.ts:Analyze the following text and determine its language (Catalan or Spanish).
server.ts:- If the text is already in ${targetName}, return it exactly as is.
server.ts:- If the text is in the other language, translate it into ${targetName}.
server.ts:Ensure you preserve any formatting, capitalizations, emoji, or style.
server.ts:CRITICAL MANDATE: Never translate the word "Tast" or "El Tast". Keep the proper name "Tast" or "El Tast" exactly as is in the output text, without converting it to any other word.
server.ts:Return ONLY the clean text, without preamble, thoughts, warnings, explanations, quotes, or markdown tags unless they were in the original.
server.ts:Text: "${text}"`;
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        const sourceName = source === 'ca' ? 'Catalan' : 'Spanish';
server.ts:        prompt = `You are a professional Catalan-Spanish bilingual translator.
server.ts:Translate the following text from ${sourceName} into ${targetName}.
server.ts:Ensure you preserve any formatting, capitalizations, emoji, or style.
server.ts:CRITICAL MANDATE: Never translate the word "Tast" or "El Tast". Keep the proper name "Tast" or "El Tast" exactly as is in the output text, without converting it to any other word.
server.ts:Return ONLY the clean translated text, without preamble, thoughts, warnings, explanations, quotes, or markdown tags unless they were in the original.
server.ts:Text: "${text}"`;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const response = await aiClient.models.generateContent({
server.ts:        model: "gemini-3.5-flash",
server.ts:        contents: prompt,
server.ts:        config: {
server.ts:          temperature: 0.1,
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      let translatedText = response.text || "";
server.ts:      translatedText = translatedText.trim();
server.ts:      if (translatedText.startsWith('"') && translatedText.endsWith('"') && !text.startsWith('"')) {
server.ts:        translatedText = translatedText.substring(1, translatedText.length - 1);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      return res.json({ translatedText: translatedText.trim() });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      const errMsg = error?.message || String(error);
server.ts:      const isQuota = errMsg.includes("429") || errMsg.includes("503") || errMsg.includes("quota") || errMsg.includes("RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED") || errMsg.includes("UNAVAILABLE");
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (isQuota) {
server.ts:        console.warn("Translation API quota exceeded (free tier limit reached). Bypassing translations gracefully.");
server.ts:        return res.status(429).json({ 
server.ts:          error: "quota_exceeded", 
server.ts:          translatedText: req.body.text || "" 
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      console.error("Error in translation API:", error);
server.ts:      return res.status(500).json({ 
server.ts:        error: "translation_failed", 
server.ts:        translatedText: req.body.text || "" 
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Vite development server / static production delivery
server.ts:  const distPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist');
server.ts:  const isProduction = process.env.NODE_ENV !== "development";
server.ts:
server.ts:  if (!isProduction) {
server.ts:    console.log("Starting server in development mode with Vite middleware...");
server.ts:    const { createServer } = await eval('import("vite")');
server.ts:    const vite = await createServer({
server.ts:      server: { middlewareMode: true },
server.ts:      appType: "spa",
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    app.use(vite.middlewares);
server.ts:  } else {
server.ts:    console.log(`Starting server in production mode. Serving static files from: ${distPath}`);
server.ts:    app.use(express.static(distPath));
server.ts:    app.get('*', (req, res) => {
server.ts:      res.sendFile(path.join(distPath, 'index.html'));
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.listen(PORT, "0.0.0.0", () => {
server.ts:    console.log(`Server listening on port ${PORT} with environment ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'production'} (detected ${isProduction ? 'production' : 'development'} mode)`);
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:startServer();
